name: Homepage
description: Introductory pages of Brand_I brands, serving marketing data and (personalized) links to other critical elements of the site (detail pages, search...)

name: Search Engine Results Page (SERP)
description: Ability to search for classifieds through diverse criteria (by location, price range, amenities, on map...)

name: Saved Search / Alerts
description: Alert consumers about new classifieds - email / mobile push

name: Classified Details Page (CDP)
description: Ability to show a detailed page of a selected classified (description, images, agency contact information...)

name: Consumer Contacting Management
description: Creating a common intermediary/Owner contacting experience for seeker

name: Home Purchase Financing
description: Ability to evaluate the feasibility of a mortgage project and show a corresponding mortgage rate (multiple degrees of maturity theoretically possible with different impact, from simple budget calculator with illustrative rate estimate (minimum), to real-time actual rates comparison covering entire market and detailed calculation parameters (advanced))

name: Consumer Portal
description: A personal portal for seekers and owner, with information about their accounts, favorites etc.

name: Seeker Profile
description: Ability to manage data on our seekers

name: Consumer Advertising Management
description: Seamless integration of advertisement products (ad placements) while ensuring effective implementation for the intermediaries through outstanding performance measured by advertising KPIs

name: SEO Management
description: SEO component management

name: Estimation Funnel
description: A service to collect more data about people estimating properties on our systems, potentially turning them into leads we can share with agencies

name: Price Page
description: A page with a visualization of average property prices per geographic location (from the region down to the exact address)

name: FSBO Online Classifieds Acquisition
description: Listing creation funnel and listing management, so property owners can advertise their property for sale without the help of an agent

name: Owner Classifieds Management
description: Management space for owner classifieds created through FSBO inside consumer portal

name: Owner Property Management
description: Brings experience of property presentation to the owners. Owners are going to see the properties that they own based on the estimations they performed as logged-in users.

name: Unified Frontend
description: A web framework for building and deploying white-label frontend applications

name: Design System
description: A collection of reusable frontend components, guided by clear standards that can be assembled to build any number of applications.

name: User Tracking
description: Ability to track user behavior

name: Intermediary Entity SSoT
description: Single source of truth for intermediary data (legal entities)

name: Intermediary Profile & Directory
description: A capability with two sides: a management page for agencies (B2B) and a public page (B2C) with an overview of an intermediary (e.g., agency), with description, logo, contact information, and listed properties

name: Intermediary Members Management
description: Managing members within intermediary organizations

name: Agency Visibility Management
description: Providing all functionality regarding the on-top visibility of an agency.

name: Agents Ratings & Reviews
description: Collecting/displaying feedback on agents.

name: Online Classifieds Acquisition
description: Ability to acquire (create and edit) classifieds of an Intermediary online in the Pro Portal

name: Classifieds Portfolio Management
description: This capability focus on providing to Intermediary a view of their classifieds, allowing them to perform some basic actions : publish, edit, delete, download pdf...

name: Classifieds Visibility Management
description: Controlling how and where listings appear

name: Classifieds Performance Management
description: Being able to provide analytics on how the classified is performing

name: Intermediary Seeker Leads Inbox
description: Inbox for incoming buyer leads

name: Seller Lead Management
description: Ability to track the lead status over its lifecycle and trigger actions/activities, e.g. keep the lead 'warm' by providing tailored communications regularly. We will have different 'users' who will take on different 'projects' over time (and maybe simultaneously), hence these people will need to be nurtured and tracked over time

name: Call Tracking
description: Identifying and analyzing calls that generate leads for intermediaries, emphasizing lead generation, provides deeper insights into which marketing efforts are most effective at driving potential customers to contact the intermediary.

name: Pro Tool Foundation
description: Foundation of Pro Tools. Including B2B shell, navigation, and shared elements

name: Property Valuation Tool
description: A set of products that allow intermediaries to evaluate and win incoming prospects, stay up to date with market trends

name: Prospection Map
description: Providing agencies with a map of prospects, based on estimations and private listings, to help them identify properties on sale (or soon to be) in their prospection area

name: Off-Platform Advertising
description: Promoting agencies and their classifieds via external channels (e.g., social media)

name: Data Foundation
description: DataHub is the host for Brand_I’s Data Catalog, a centralized repository designed to make data available, documented & searchable for everyone in the organization.

name: GeoRef
description: A system for providing geographic data to other capabilities (map display, address autocomplete, distance calculations...).

name: Property Knowledge
description: Ability to capture both property and transactional level data about properties across all countries (e.g., # of rooms, previous owners, …)

name: Market Knowledge
description: Ability to capture real estate market data (price, rent, market tension, …) available at various geographies (e.g., city / country)

name: Property Estimation
description: A service estimaitng the price of a property

name: Economic Content Creation
description: Producing valuable and relevant content that supports users' understanding of market trends, investment analysis, and financial aspects of real estate, optimizing resources to maximize engagement and user benefit

name: Business Analytics
description: Ability to provide the data sets to be processed to build reports across the enterprise (includes preparation of source data sets, does not include further data analytics; product analytics, business analytics, metrics)

name: Classifieds Sort Order
description: Ability to merge related scores (incl. score for payment) for e.g., classifieds and provide feedback on visibility (e.g., order)

name: Classifieds Recommendations
description: Ability to match published classifieds with seekers' saved search criteria and provide recommendations (match classified & seeker)

name: Lead x Agent Matching
description: Ability to associate a qualified lead with an agent based on scoring

name: Actor Scoring
description: Ability to score the intermediary, seller & buyer, including calculation of an individual score per actor (based on internal sources or external data sources) and a unified scoring model across brands and actors

name: Fraud Detection
description: Ability to automatically censor a classified

name: Chat Messaging Services
description: Ability to have an inbox for contact requests to track and measure agency responsiveness

name: Notification Service
description: Ability to send notifications with user preferences (via Email, Push, ...)

name: Marketing Automation
description: A set of services for typical marketing automation (running email or phone marketing campaigns)

name: Seeker Lead Management
description: Managing seeker leads (e.g., via classifieds details contact form)

name: B2B CRM
description: As a target tech solution: Build a country-specific CRM based on salesforce to be used across all Brand_I brands within this country. For legal reasons, data must be split between B2B and B2C customers using different Salesforce instances.

name: B2C CRM
description: As a target tech solution: Build a country-specific CRM based on salesforce to be used across all Brand_I brands within this country. For legal reasons - data needs to be split between B2B and B2C customers using different Salesforce instances.

name: Unified Contracts Gateway
description: A unified gateway exposing CRM contract data to other capabilities

name: Authentication Service
description: Ability to manage actors (seeker, owner, intermediary) accounts (user registration, sign-in, forget the password, …)

name: User Management
description: Managing users and their accounts, and basic data

name: Privacy Services
description:
Ability to remove and get information from personal data
GDPR :
1) constraints by regulation (Data obfuscation, right management...)
2) Ability to get PII information and removal

name: Identity Verification
description: Ability to certify the identity of an actor via validation of a certification file (actor validation via certification file)

name: Classifieds Import
description: Ability to import classifieds on either FTP or via API

name: Classifieds Management
description: A backbone of classifieds management for all sites, distributing imported classifieds to all channels

name: Classifieds Export
description: Ability to post classifieds on multiple portals (including competition) at the same time

name: Sold Properties Management
description: Ability to manage (create, store, and distribute) Sold Properties across allactor domains

name: Media Management
description: Ability to manage (create, store, and distribute) media (images, videos) for all the actors (including services such as virus scan, and global distribution via CDNs)

name: Software Vendors Integration Hub
description: Ability to enable seamless integration of our API marketplace ecosystem, facilitating usage of our APIs in every market we operate in

name: Payment Platform
description: Ability to have a generic payment that can be used across the actor domains.

name: Content Management
description: Ability to manage content to be displayed in the channels

name: Product Backoffice
description: Ability to manage a diverse set of customer issues in Brand_I products

name: Document Management
description: Ability to manage a diverse set of customer issues in Brand_I products

name: AWS Foundation
description: Ability to manage infrastructure for Information Systems (AWS, network, VPN...)

name: DevOps Tooling
description: The DevOps tooling team will provide Domain teams with standards and tools to simplify developer lifecycle of their applications.
